title: Orbital Energies and Koopmans' Theorem
description: Understand the physical meaning of Hartree-Fock orbital energies and their connection to ionization potentials and electron affinities through Koopmans' theorem.
learningObjectives: Apply Koopmans' theorem for ionization potentials
Understand the limitations of Koopmans' approximation
Analyze HOMO-LUMO gaps and their meaning
Connect orbital energies to spectroscopy and reactivity
